info.title: Verify CLI
info.description:
A command line tool for verifying files are unchanged, or if they are then show a diff of what has changed.
As it leverages the Verify library, when run in an interactive environment it can also use any supported installed diff viewers to show the diff.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: A command-line tool to verify files against expected content.

options.name: --scrub-inline-datetime
options.description: Format for inline date times to scrub, e.g., 'yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss.fffZ'.

options.name: --scrub-inline-pattern
options.description: One or more regex patterns to match inline strings for scrubbing. Repeat the option to specify multiple patterns.

options.name: --scrub-inline-remove
options.description: One or more text values to remove from the file content. Repeat the option to specify multiple values (exact match, not regex).

options.name: --verbosity
options.description: Set the verbosity level. Options are: quiet, minimal, normal, detailed, diagnostic.
